title: centaurea cineraria var. aeolica
intro: Centaurea cineraria var. aeolica, also known as Silver Dust or Dusty Miller, is a perennial plant in the daisy family native to the Mediterranean region. The plant's leaves have a silvery-gray color, making it a popular ornamental plant in gardens. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as arthritis, skin conditions, and wounds. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized for its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing.
